name: Greek Chicken Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F.
Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, oregano, thyme, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Pat chicken dry and coat thoroughly in the marinade. Let sit 15 min at room temp.
Arrange chicken in a baking dish. Scatter tomatoes, olives, and red onion around the chicken.
Bake 35-40 minutes until chicken skin is golden and internal temp reaches 165°F.
Crumble feta over everything, garnish with parsley, and serve immediately.

name: Greek Chicken Pita Sandwiches
instructions: Pound chicken breasts to even thickness. Marinate in olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper for 20+ min.
Cook chicken in a hot skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat, 6-7 min per side until cooked through.
Rest chicken 5 min, then slice into strips.
Warm pitas in oven or dry pan.
Build sandwiches: spread tzatziki generously on pita, layer lettuce, tomato, cucumber, olives, chicken strips, and feta.
Fold and serve immediately.

name: Greek Chicken with Quinoa Salad

ingredients.item: extra virgin olive oil for dressing

instructions: Cook quinoa in chicken broth per package directions. Fluff and let cool.
Marinate chicken in 2 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp lemon juice, garlic, and oregano for 15+ min.
Cook chicken in a hot skillet 6-8 min per side. Rest 5 min, slice.
Toss cooled quinoa with tomatoes, cucumber, olives, red onion, parsley, and mint.
Whisk together remaining olive oil, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, salt and pepper. Drizzle over salad.
Top with sliced chicken and crumbled feta. Serve warm or at room temp.

name: Bruschetta Chicken with Mozzarella & Rice
instructions: Cook rice in chicken broth with a pinch of salt and butter. Set aside covered.
Make bruschetta: combine diced tomatoes, basil, garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Let sit while you cook the chicken.
Season chicken with Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Sear chicken in olive oil over medium-high heat, 5-6 min per side.
Top each breast with mozzarella slices and cover pan 2-3 min until melted.
Plate rice, top with chicken, pile on the bruschetta mixture, and drizzle with balsamic glaze.

name: Chipotle Chicken Thigh Bowls
instructions: Marinate chicken thighs in chipotle peppers, adobo sauce, garlic powder, cumin, paprika, olive oil, lime juice, and salt for at least 30 min.
Cook chicken in a hot cast iron or grill pan 5-6 min per side until charred and cooked through.
Char the corn in a dry hot pan until slightly blackened, 4-5 min.
Make the salad: toss corn, avocado, tomatoes, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, and lime juice together.
Build bowls: rice on the bottom, sliced chipotle chicken, then the corn avocado salad on top.
Optional: drizzle with sour cream, hot sauce, or extra lime.

name: Grilled Shrimp Tacos with Mango Salsa
instructions: Make the mango salsa: combine mango, red pepper, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, and lime juice. Set aside.
Toss shrimp with olive oil, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and lime juice.
Grill or cook shrimp in a hot grill pan 1-2 min per side until pink and slightly charred.
Warm tortillas directly over a gas flame or in a dry pan.
Build tacos: drizzle tortilla with sour cream, add shredded cabbage, 3-4 shrimp, and top with mango salsa.
Serve immediately with extra lime wedges.

name: Air Fryer Salmon with Veggies
instructions: Preheat air fryer to 400°F.
Toss vegetables in 2 tbsp olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Mix remaining olive oil, lemon juice, smoked paprika, onion powder, dill, salt, and pepper. Brush over salmon.
Air fry vegetables at 400°F for 8 min, shaking halfway.
Push veggies to the side, add salmon fillets skin-side down. Air fry 8-10 min depending on thickness.
Salmon is done when it flakes easily. Serve with lemon wedges.

name: Honey Sriracha Shrimp
instructions: Whisk together honey, sriracha, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and cornstarch into a sauce.
Pat shrimp very dry with paper towels. Season lightly with salt.
Heat a large skillet over high heat. Add butter and shrimp in a single layer.
Cook shrimp 1 min per side without moving. Remove from pan.
Pour sauce into the hot pan and simmer 1-2 min until thickened and glossy.
Return shrimp to pan and toss to coat. Serve over rice, garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.

name: Teriyaki Steak Bowls
instructions: Mix soy sauce, mirin, honey, garlic, ginger, sesame oil, and cornstarch for the teriyaki sauce.
Reserve half the sauce. Marinate steak in the other half for 20+ min.
Grill or sear steak on high heat 3-4 min per side for medium-rare. Rest 5-8 min.
Simmer reserved sauce in a small pan until thickened, 2-3 min.
Slice steak thinly against the grain.
Build bowls: rice, steak slices, edamame, carrots, cucumber, and avocado. Drizzle with teriyaki sauce and garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.

name: Steak with Veggie Skewers

ingredients.item: red bell pepper, cut in chunks
yellow bell pepper, cut in chunks

instructions: Soak wooden skewers 30 min if using. Preheat grill to high.
Rub steak with olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, Worcestershire, salt, and pepper. Let rest at room temp 20 min.
Toss vegetables with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Thread onto skewers alternating colors and types.
Grill veggie skewers 8-10 min total, rotating every few minutes.
Grill steak to desired doneness (4-5 min per side for medium). Baste with garlic herb butter the last 2 min.
Rest steak 8-10 min. Slice against the grain. Serve with the skewers.

name: Grilled Steak Tacos

ingredients.item: salsa verde or pico de gallo

instructions: Marinate steak in lime juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, chili powder, paprika, and salt for 30+ min.
Grill over high heat 3-4 min per side for medium-rare. Let rest 8 min.
Slice steak very thin against the grain.
Warm tortillas on the grill or directly over flame.
Build tacos: steak, white onion, cilantro, avocado, a spoonful of salsa, and cotija cheese.
Squeeze lime over everything and add hot sauce to taste.

name: Ground Beef Burger Bowls with Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Toss sweet potato cubes with olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Roast 25 min until crispy.
Brown ground beef in a hot skillet, breaking into crumbles. Season with garlic powder, onion powder, Worcestershire, salt, and pepper.
Make quick special sauce: mix mayo, ketchup, mustard, pickle juice, and a pinch of smoked paprika.
Assemble bowls: romaine base, roasted sweet potatoes, seasoned ground beef, tomatoes, pickles, red onion, and cheese.
Drizzle generously with the special sauce and serve.

name: Ground Beef Power Bowls
instructions: Roast sweet potato cubes at 425°F with olive oil, salt, and pepper for 25 min.
Brown ground beef and season with garlic powder, onion powder, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Build bowls: roasted sweet potatoes as the base, seasoned ground beef, a generous scoop of cottage cheese, and diced avocado.
Drizzle the entire bowl generously with hot honey.
Finish with everything bagel seasoning, red pepper flakes, chives, and flaky salt.
Serve immediately while sweet potatoes and beef are hot.

name: Ground Turkey Fried Rice
instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat until very hot.
Add 1 tbsp sesame oil, cook turkey, breaking up well. Season with a splash of soy sauce. Remove and set aside.
In same pan, sauté white onion and garlic 2 min. Add ginger.
Push to sides, scramble eggs in the center until just set. Break into pieces.
Add cold rice and press flat. Let it sit 1-2 min without touching to get crispy bits.
Add back turkey, peas and carrots, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and remaining sesame oil. Toss everything together. Top with green onions and sesame seeds.

name: Ground Beef, Broccoli & Mushroom Stir Fry

ingredients.item: cooked rice or noodles for serving

instructions: Whisk soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, beef broth, and cornstarch into a sauce.
Brown ground beef on high heat, drain excess fat. Set aside.
In the same pan, sauté mushrooms until golden, 4-5 min. Add garlic, ginger, and red pepper flakes, cook 1 min.
Add broccoli florets with a splash of water. Cover and steam 2-3 min.
Return beef to pan, pour in sauce, toss everything together 1-2 min until glossy.
Serve over rice or noodles, topped with green onions and sesame seeds.

name: Ground Turkey with Zucchini Noodles
instructions: Spiralize zucchini, toss with a pinch of salt and let sit in a colander to drain 10 min.
Brown ground turkey in olive oil with onion. Season with salt and pepper.
Add garlic, Italian seasoning, and red pepper flakes. Cook 1 min.
Add crushed tomatoes, simmer 10-12 min until sauce thickens.
Pat zucchini dry with paper towels. Sauté in a separate pan with a bit of olive oil for 2-3 min only — don't overcook.
Serve sauce over zucchini noodles, top with fresh basil, parmesan, and dollops of ricotta if using.

name: Turkey Burgers with Pretzel Buns
instructions: Remove patties from fridge 10 min before cooking. Season both sides with garlic powder, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Make the sriracha aioli: mix mayo, Dijon, and sriracha together. Set aside.
Heat a skillet or grill pan over medium-high heat with olive oil. Cook patties 4-5 min per side until internal temp reaches 165°F — do not press down.
Lay a slice of cheese on each patty in the last minute of cooking, cover the pan to melt.
Meanwhile, butter the cut sides of the pretzel buns and toast in a dry pan until golden, 1-2 min.
Build burgers: spread aioli on both bun halves, then layer lettuce, tomato, patty with melted cheese, avocado slices, and red onion. Serve immediately.

name: Ground Beef & Sweet Potato Hash
instructions: Microwave sweet potato cubes 3-4 min to par-cook (speeds up the process dramatically).
Heat olive oil in a large skillet. Add sweet potatoes and cook until crispy edges form, about 5 min.
Add onion and bell pepper. Cook 3 min. Add garlic and spices, cook 1 more min.
Push everything to the sides, brown ground beef in the center, breaking it up. Mix everything together.
Optional: make wells in the hash, crack eggs in, cover and cook until set.
Top with fresh cilantro and hot sauce. Serve directly from the pan.

name: Buffalo Chicken Crock Pot Salad
instructions: Place chicken in slow cooker. Pour buffalo sauce and ranch seasoning over top. Add butter.
Cook on low 3-4 hours or high 1.5-2 hours until tender.
Shred chicken with two forks and toss in the cooking juices.
While chicken is warm, assemble salad bases of romaine, celery, carrots, and tomatoes.
Top with generous amount of warm buffalo chicken, blue cheese, and green onions.
Drizzle with ranch and extra buffalo sauce. Finish with tortilla strips.

name: Grilled Chicken & Strawberry Spinach Salad
instructions: Season chicken with olive oil, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Grill or cook in a pan 6-7 min per side until cooked through. Rest and slice.
Make balsamic vinaigrette: whisk balsamic, honey, Dijon, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Build salads: spinach base, strawberries, red onion, candied nuts, and goat cheese.
Top with sliced chicken.
Drizzle with balsamic vinaigrette right before serving.

name: Southwest Chicken Salad
instructions: Coat chicken with olive oil and southwest seasoning. Cook in a hot skillet 6-7 min per side until cooked through. Rest and slice.
Make quick chipotle ranch: mix Greek yogurt, salsa, lime juice, and cumin. Thin with a splash of water if needed.
Build salads: romaine, black beans, corn, tomatoes, bell pepper, and avocado.
Top with sliced seasoned chicken and cheese.
Drizzle with chipotle ranch. Finish with tortilla strips.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Salad
instructions: Marinate chicken in 2 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp lemon juice, oregano, and garlic 20+ min.
Cook chicken in a grill pan or skillet until cooked through. Rest and slice.
Make lemon herb dressing: whisk remaining olive oil, lemon juice, red wine vinegar, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Build salads: greens, tomatoes, cucumber, olives, red onion, and pepperoncini.
Top with sliced chicken and feta.
Drizzle with dressing, add a scoop of hummus on the side, and serve with pita chips.

name: Kale Pasta Caesar Salad with Chicken

ingredients.item: curly kale, stems removed and chopped

instructions: Cook pasta al dente. Drain, rinse with cold water, and toss with a drizzle of olive oil. Set aside.
Season chicken with Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt and pepper. Cook until done. Rest and slice.
Massage kale with a pinch of salt and a drizzle of olive oil for 2-3 min until softened.
Toss kale with cooled pasta, Caesar dressing, lemon juice, and half the parmesan.
Top with sliced chicken, croutons, remaining parmesan, and plenty of black pepper.
Serve immediately (the kale holds up much better than romaine).

name: Grilled Flank Steak & Arugula Salad

ingredients.item: extra virgin olive oil for dressing

instructions: Marinate steak in olive oil, garlic, balsamic, Worcestershire, Dijon, salt, and pepper for 30+ min.
Grill steak on high heat 3-4 min per side for medium-rare. Rest 8 min.
Make lemon vinaigrette: whisk lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil, Dijon, salt, and pepper.
Toss arugula with vinaigrette, tomatoes, and red onion.
Slice steak very thin against the grain.
Arrange salad on plates, lay steak slices on top, shave parmesan over everything, and scatter pine nuts.

name: Cheese Tortellini & Sausage Soup
instructions: Brown sausage in olive oil in a large pot, breaking into crumbles. Drain some fat if needed.
Add onion and cook 3 min. Add garlic, Italian seasoning, and red pepper flakes, cook 1 more min.
Pour in crushed tomatoes and chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
Add tortellini and cook per package directions (usually 3-5 min for fresh, 8-10 for frozen).
Stir in heavy cream and spinach, cook until spinach wilts, 1-2 min. Season with salt and pepper.
Ladle into bowls, top with parmesan and fresh basil. Serve with crusty bread for dunking.

name: Spaghetti Squash with Feta & Tomatoes
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Brush squash halves with olive oil, season with salt and pepper. Place cut-side down and roast 40-45 min.
In a baking dish, toss cherry tomatoes and garlic with olive oil, salt, red pepper flakes, and place the block of feta in the center.
Roast tomatoes and feta alongside squash for the last 25-30 min until tomatoes burst and feta is golden.
Use a fork to scrape squash into spaghetti-like strands.
Smash the roasted feta and garlic into a creamy sauce. Mix with the burst tomatoes.
Toss squash strands in the feta tomato sauce. Top with fresh basil, a drizzle of balsamic glaze, and pine nuts if using.

name: Buffalo Chicken Crock Pot Soup
instructions: Add chicken, broth, buffalo sauce, ranch seasoning, celery, carrots, onion, garlic, corn, and tomatoes to slow cooker. Season with salt and pepper.
Cook on low 6-8 hours or high 3-4 hours.
Remove chicken and shred with two forks.
Add cream cheese to the hot soup and stir until fully melted and incorporated.
Return shredded chicken to the soup. Stir and season with salt and pepper.
Serve topped with shredded cheddar, sour cream, and green onions.

name: White Chicken Chili
instructions: Add chicken, white beans, broth, green chiles, onion, garlic, cumin, chili powder, and oregano to slow cooker.
Cook on low 6-8 hours or high 3-4 hours.
Remove chicken and shred. Mash some of the beans against the side with a spoon to thicken.
Stir in cream cheese until melted, then add heavy cream, corn, and lime juice.
Return shredded chicken. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Serve topped with Monterey Jack, cilantro, sliced avocado, and a squeeze of lime.

name: Baked Meatball Marinara Pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Arrange meatballs on a baking sheet and bake 20 minutes until cooked through.
Cook rigatoni in salted boiling water until al dente. Drain and set aside.

Make marinara: heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and cook 1 minute. Pour in crushed tomatoes, add half the basil, season with salt and pepper, and simmer 10 minutes.
Add drained rigatoni to the skillet and toss to coat with the marinara sauce. Nestle baked meatballs into the pasta.
Lay fresh mozzarella slices over the top. Transfer to oven or switch to broil.
Broil 3-4 minutes until mozzarella is bubbly and lightly golden.
Finish with remaining fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil. Serve immediately.
